title: Duck Blue Brown WRENDALE Large Porcelain JUG 15CM X 9.5CM X 15CM - 0.6L
features: Approximate Size: H15cm x W9.5 bottom - W8cm top x 15cm including the handle. Capacity 0.6L (1pt)
description: This porcelain jug features a large duck design on a white background on each side and is finished with leaves on the handle. The jug is approximately H15cm x W9.5 bottom – W8cm top x 15cm including the handle, The jug capacity is approximately 0.6L (1pt) and is microwave and dishwasher safe.
